---
title: "Pol Carbó Mestre"
image: "pol2.jpeg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/polcarbo/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/PCarbMest"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/pcarbomestre"
  - label: Email
    url: "pcarbomestre@bren.ucsb.edu"
output:
  postcards::jolla
site: distill::distill_website
---

Passionate about sea-related issues, Pol Carbó Mestre has dedicated his career to ocean exploration. After receiving his B.S. in Marine Science, Pol participated in several marine projects working as an environmental field researcher. Currently, he is studying marine resources management at UCSB.
